title: Corrupt (Horror)
description: A player called xXShadowReaperXx was corrupted and turned into a corrupted boss.
body:
# There are 3 new structures, 1 new mob, 1 new boss, 1 new weapon and 4 new music discs!

## **New Structures:**

xXShadowReapersXx's House:

![House 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd0cbb9def3266e50655f220371c40fcaf90aa30.png)

This is the first house of xXShadowReapersXx.

xXShadowReapersXx's House 2:

![House 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e8212d6d22f315258ff1bbdbf3e923ac701a407.png)

This is the second house of xXShadowReapersXx.

Boss Spawner:

![Boss Spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d0de1c1470487afd4fb6ec975e61858e747cb16.png)

In this structure you can summon the boss of this mod.

## **New Mobs:**

TESTIFICSTE:

![TESTIFICATE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba953b3f9e25c63e86e2dbb373692fc992574988.png)

A simple mob that attacks the player when someone attacks him.

## **New Bosses:**

ĄŢąXlDşěQD©:

![Boss 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18d58f0c50b6d5c91aae777307e8977764905fac.png)

This is the new boss. It's fast and strong.

## **New Weapons:**

Corrupted Sword:

![Corrupted Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a408f80d224cd17f5578a0182ade4b2097113e7.png)

A stronger diamond sword.

## **New Music Discs:**

New music discs:

![Music Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be59d466b3d2a9558b757bcd5627e64e739780cd.png)
